data.body: Second review BLOCK remediation: accepted duplicate compute boundary findings fd230e20fc5693fd5/fb7adb872b072dff5/ffe46969bcea67a5e/f506dc807cd0c2c31 by extending the existing attest.compute_validity with a plan-review-only profile parameter; completion-verifier callers remain unchanged. Accepted f2d0a061965422b65 by gating drift_refresh_candidate through compute_validity before returning a candidate. Accepted f7affe311050959b6 with fixed top-level severity aggregation and the empty legacy-unpinned rule. Rerunning before downstream review.
